## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Testing

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests locally
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-visible changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Public CLI, import, and contract surfaces remain intentional
- [ ] Runtime contract changes are reflected in the docs
- [ ] Package metadata and release notes are updated when needed
- [ ] Changelog entry added or updated when user-visible behavior changed
